title: wrong results for count()/count(distinct) on the same attribute
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), age INTEGER, salary DECIMAL(10, 2));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, age, salary) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30, 50000.00), (2, 'Bob', 25, 60000.00), (3, NULL, 28, 55000.00), (4, 'Alice', 30, 50000.00);
SELECT COUNT(name) AS count_name FROM test_table;
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT name) AS count_distinct_name FROM test_table;
SELECT COUNT(name) AS count_name, COUNT(DISTINCT name) AS count_distinct_name FROM test_table;
key_bug_features: count() and count(distinct) on same attribute
